content.question: What will be the specific enrollment trajectory for 6- and 8-year gimnazium applications and admissions as the declining cohort progresses through primary school (ages 10-12 selection points) over the next 5-10 years? Will selectivity ratios (places available relative to qualified applicants) remain high, decline, or reverse?
content.reduction_path: Commission a cohort-cohort projection model specific to gimnazium-eligible population in each urban/county-seat region, disaggregating in-migration assumptions from natural decline; compare predicted eligible pools at selection points (age 10, 12) against current capacity and admissions rates.
